title: Bonn, North Rhine-Westphalia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bonn, North Rhine-Westphalia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bonn is a city in North Rhine-Westphalia with a population of 330,000. The former capital on the Rhine, now a UN hub with a charming old town, Beethoven’s birthplace, and a relaxed riverside lifestyle.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
